title: あたしがあの子であの子があたし！？

text_block_list.name: Tosen and Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaaah!
Tchwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
OUCH! Look where you're going when you're
running, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Jordan! Are you okay—huh?! Wh-what in
the world?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
The heck is this?! Did we switch bodies? But
that's, like... not even possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text: This is TERRIBLE! I've got so much class rep work to do today! How am I supposed to do it looking like this?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
People will think you've stolen my prestigious
position right out from under me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text: That's what you're worried about? Well... I do know how annoying it is to be misunderstood.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Why don't I just pretend to be you for the
time being?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
Really?! You would do that for me?! Are you
sure?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
It's not like there's any point in just standing
around. Tell me what I should do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
First there's the campus patrol! You've gotta
Bakushin every corner of the school! It really
builds up your stamina!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text: For real? You're doing something that lame all the time?! That's seriously intense...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
Then you have to water the flowers! It's pretty
hard work, BUT it's for the benefit of the whole
school! Plus, it'll give you the muscles you need to
support your Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text: Okay, fine. I'll do whatever it takes. I mean, it does sound like it'll build muscle...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew... Finally finished. I can't believe I've been
such a good little student today—hilarious.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you saying? Aren't you always
good?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O?
text_block_list.text:
You helped one of your friends when they fell
down before, remember?! The class rep is always
watching, you know!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
That's seriously kinda creepy. But I guess I've
gotta respect that you keep an eye on everyone.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, today's definitely been something. I feel
like I'll be able to use this in my racing... Or, like—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan?
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What is it this time?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! W-was that just... Was it all just... a dream?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh crap, Bakushin O is still out cold! Heeey,
wake up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tosen Jordan had a strange dream after
colliding head-on with Sakura Bakushin O. In the
end, she's learned something from the whole
experience.
